tables.title: Mechanical Fall vs. Fall With Possible Medical Cause
rows: Dizziness, palpitations, chest discomfort, or vision changes before the fall
Patient cannot recall the moment of the fall (possible loss of consciousness)
Full medical workup (cardiac, glucose, infection screen) in addition to injury assessment

tables.title: High-Risk Medication Classes in Geriatric Trauma
rows: Elevated risk after even minor head injury; can present with delayed symptoms
Consider as a contributing factor in unexplained falls
Consider as a cause of dizziness/fall, especially with position changes
